query: SELECT cr.competitionId, cr.status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM competition_registrations cr WHERE cr.competitionId IN (90003, 300001) GROUP BY cr.competitionId, cr.status;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mWBJwMymT3uxJ8c.d6db9e21a524 --database dRgYLfmNL5QAGwfaYvi5WU --execute SELECT cr.competitionId, cr.status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM competition_registrations cr WHERE cr.competitionId IN (90003, 300001) GROUP BY cr.competitionId, cr.status;
